name: ai-health-report-analyzer
description: AI Health Report Analyzer & Assistant monorepo

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.docker:smoke: docker compose build && docker compose up -d
